extensionDescription.message: Gukosora imikoreshereze y'icyarabu y'umwuga kuri buri rubuga rwa interineti. Ikosora intera y'inyuguti, ishyizemo font nziza z'icyarabu, kandi ikosora ibibazo byo kwerekana bituma inyandiko y'icyarabu icikagurika.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Kora cyangwa uhanganye ikiganiro cya Arabic Type

letterSpacingNote.message: Intera y'inyuguti ihora ishyirwa kuri 0 kugira ngo irinde gutandukana kw'inyuguti z'icyarabu. Iki nicyo gituma cy'ingenzi cyo kwerekana icyarabu kisenyutse kuri interineti.

forceRTLDescription.message: Ihatira icyerekezo cy'iburyo-ibumoso ku byiciro by'inyandiko y'icyarabu. Kora kuri rubuga aho icyarabu kigaragara nabi ibumoso-iburyo.

diacriticsDescription.message: Irushaho kwerekana ibimenyetso by'inyajwi y'icyarabu (tashkeel) kugira ngo irinde gukata hejuru no munsi y'umurongo w'inyandiko.

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: Koresha font itandukanye kuri uru rubuga

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Hitamo font itandukanye gusa kuri uru rubuga, urenganya amahitamo ya font yawe y'isi yose.

fontSourceNote.message: Font zitangwa na Google Fonts. Bisaba umurongo wa interineti mugihe cyo gupakira bwa mbere.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Ibisabwa bya font boherezwa kuri seriveri ya Google. Reba fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusGlobalMode.message: Ukoresheje uburyo bw'isi yose — ibiranga lang/dir byabonetse.

statusNoArabic.message: Nta nyandiko y'icyarabu yabonetse kuri uru rupapuro.
